name: Comercial Bot
tagline: AI sales chatbot platform with lead management and order processing
description: A multi-tenant AI-powered sales chatbot platform that automates commercial interactions. Features intelligent lead management, product catalog with order processing, AI function calling for dynamic conversations, document-based RAG with pgvector embeddings, and analytics dashboards. Supports multiple AI providers including OpenAI, Groq, and Google Generative AI.
highlights: AI sales chatbot with function calling for dynamic product recommendations
Lead management pipeline with automated qualification
Order processing system with product catalog integration
RAG with pgvector embeddings for document-based knowledge
Multi-provider AI support: OpenAI, Groq, and Google Generative AI
